text:
after making world and did mergemaster and fresh reboot with fresh kernel, got waringing that said ipv6_activate_all_interface should be used instead of ipv6_enable.

but once ipv6_activate_all_inteface is set, another warning that says ipv6_enable is not set properly popped up.
